definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_STATUS
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where pat_status equals 'Active'

definitions.name: filter:where:BIRTH_DATE
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where birth_date is greater than '1950-01-01'

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_LAST_NAME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where pat_last_name matches pattern 'Smith%'
